participant_id.Description: Unique participant identifier matching entries in participants.tsv (format: sub-Damy###).

pss_raw.Description: Perceived Stress Scale (PSS) total score — degree to which situations in one’s life are appraised as stressful. Norms for males: mean = 12.1, SD = 5.9; for females: mean = 13.7, SD = 6.6. Higher scores = greater perceived stress.
